7 #ifndef INONLINEARMODEL_H
8 #define INONLINEARMODEL_H
9 /* Author : gratienj at Mon Aug 25 2008
10  * Interface for NonLinearModel
11  * This interface is design to implement Non linear Numerical models which are based on
12  * a non linear system that can be solved by an iterative non linear solver
13  */
14 
15 class INonLinearModel
16 {
17 public:
19  virtual ~INonLinearModel() { }
20 
22  virtual void startNewtonStep() = 0 ;
23 
25  virtual void endNewtonStep() = 0 ;
26 };
27 
28 class IIterationNonLinearModel
29 {
30 public :
31  IIterationNonLinearModel(){}
32  virtual ~IIterationNonLinearModel() {}
33  virtual void setCurrentNonLinearIteration(Integer iteration) = 0 ;
34 };
35 
36 class INonLinearSystem ;
37 class INonLinearProblem
38 {
39 public:
41  virtual ~INonLinearProblem() { }
42 
44  virtual INonLinearSystem* getNonLinearSystem() { return NULL ; }
45 } ;
46 
47 #endif
